mapper.select:
select count(1) from t_lh_schedule_result where is_delete = 0 and (IS_RELEASE = 3 or IS_RELEASE = 4) and id in
#{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_schedule_publish_record
id, procedure_code, publish_status, schedule_date, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag, remark, data_version,
#{id}, #{procedureCode}, #{publishStatus}, #{scheduleDate}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{delFlag}, #{remark}, #{dataVersion},

INSERT INTO MES_LH_SCHEDULE_RESULT( LH_BATCH_NO , ORDER_NO , LH_MACHINE_CODE , LH_MACHINE_NAME , LEFT_RIGHT_MOLD , SPEC_CODE , SPEC_DESC , DAILY_PLAN_QTY , SCHEDULE_DATE , PRODUCTION_STATUS , CLASS1_PLAN_QTY , CLASS1_PLAN_QTY_SEQ, CLASS1_ANALYSIS , CLASS2_PLAN_QTY , CLASS2_PLAN_QTY_SEQ, CLASS2_ANALYSIS , CLASS3_PLAN_QTY , CLASS3_ANALYSIS , IS_RELEASE , REMARK , DATA_VERSION , CREATE_DATE , UPDATE_DATE , IS_DELETE , FACTORY_CODE, COMPANY_CODE) SELECT BATCH_NO , ORDER_NO , LH_MACHINE_CODE , LH_MACHINE_NAME , LEFT_RIGHT_MOLD , SPEC_CODE , SPEC_DESC , DAILY_PLAN_QTY , SCHEDULE_DATE , PRODUCTION_STATUS , CLASS1_PLAN_QTY , CASE WHEN IFNULL(CLASS1_PLAN_QTY,0) > 0 THEN 1 END CLASS1_PLAN_QTY_SEQ, CLASS1_ANALYSIS , CLASS2_PLAN_QTY , CASE WHEN IFNULL(CLASS2_PLAN_QTY,0) > 0 THEN 1 END CLASS2_PLAN_QTY_SEQ, CLASS2_ANALYSIS , CLASS3_PLAN_QTY , CLASS3_ANALYSIS , '1' , REMARK , #{dataVersion} DATA_VERSION, NOW() CREATE_DATE , UPDATE_TIME UPDATE_DATE , IS_DELETE, #{factoryCode}, #{companyCode} FROM T_LH_SCHEDULE_RESULT WHERE id in #{id}
mapper.select: select * from (select c.id, c.schedule_Date, c.lh_machine_code, c.spec_desc, c.spec_code, c.embryo_code, ( case when IFNULL(CLASS1_PLAN_QTY, 0) = 0 then ( case when IFNULL(CLASS2_PLAN_QTY, 0) = 0 then ( case when IFNULL(CLASS3_PLAN_QTY, 0) = 0 then ( case when IFNULL(CLASS4_PLAN_QTY, 0) = 0 then null else CLASS4_START_TIME end ) else CLASS3_START_TIME end ) else CLASS2_START_TIME end ) else CLASS1_START_TIME end ) as startDate, ( case when IFNULL(CLASS1_PLAN_QTY, 0) = 0 then ( case when IFNULL(CLASS2_PLAN_QTY, 0) = 0 then ( case when IFNULL(CLASS3_PLAN_QTY, 0) = 0 then ( case when IFNULL(CLASS4_PLAN_QTY, 0) = 0 then null else CLASS4_END_TIME end ) else CLASS3_END_TIME end ) else CLASS2_END_TIME end ) else CLASS1_END_TIME end ) as endDate, IFNULL(class1_plan_qty, 0) + IFNULL(class2_plan_qty, 0) + IFNULL(class3_plan_qty, 0) + IFNULL(class4_plan_qty, 0) + IFNULL(class5_plan_qty, 0) + IFNULL(class6_plan_qty, 0) as planQty, IFNULL(CLASS1_FINISH_QTY, 0) + IFNULL(CLASS2_FINISH_QTY, 0) + IFNULL(CLASS3_FINISH_QTY, 0) + IFNULL(CLASS4_FINISH_QTY, 0) + IFNULL(CLASS5_FINISH_QTY, 0) + IFNULL(CLASS6_FINISH_QTY, 0) as finishQty from T_LH_SCHEDULE_RESULT c where 1 = 1 and c.IS_DELETE = '0' and c.spec_desc is not null and c.embryo_code is not null and c.schedule_date = #{scheduleDate}) t where planQty > 0 AND startDate is not null AND endDate is not null order by lh_machine_code, startDate

select SPEC_CODE, PRODUCT_CODE, REAL_SCHEDULE_DATE, FACTORY_CODE, IFNULL(sum(CLASS1_FINISH_QTY),0)+IFNULL(sum(CLASS2_FINISH_QTY),0)+IFNULL(sum(CLASS3_FINISH_QTY),0)+IFNULL(sum(CLASS4_FINISH_QTY),0)+IFNULL(sum(CLASS5_FINISH_QTY),0)+IFNULL(sum(CLASS6_FINISH_QTY),0) as totalFinishQty, IFNULL(sum(DAILY_PLAN_QTY),0) as totalPlanQty from t_lh_schedule_result where REAL_SCHEDULE_DATE >= #{vo.productionStartDate} and REAL_SCHEDULE_DATE <= #{vo.productionEndDate} and FACTORY_CODE = #{vo.factoryCode} and IS_DELETE = '0' GROUP BY SPEC_CODE,PRODUCT_CODE,REAL_SCHEDULE_DATE,FACTORY_CODE ORDER BY REAL_SCHEDULE_DATE ASC
